name: Caught
overview: Destorm was a typical man who slept with his side chick while his girl was away. It was to his surprise that his girl came home early. Series of unfortunate events takes place as he gets into a bigger mess than he originally started. As this upbeat story progresses you'll find the tunes, characters and plots eye-catching and won't want it to end!

trailers.title: DeStorm - Caught - BLOOPERS and BTS! (w/King Bach)
